query:
SELECT
            l.id,
            l.vehicle_id,
            l.km_allowed,
            l.km_start,
            l.start_date,
            l.end_date,
            l.status,
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT value FROM public.mileage_log m
                 WHERE m.vehicle_id = l.vehicle_id
                 ORDER BY recorded_at DESC, created_at DESC
                 LIMIT 1),
                l.km_start
            ) AS "km_current!"
        FROM public.contracts_loa l
        WHERE l.vehicle_id = $1
        ORDER BY l.start_date DESC
